name: code-block-with-copy
description: Pre-formatted code block with an inset copy-to-clipboard button that fades in on hover. Uses navigator.clipboard.writeText with a textarea fallback. 'Copied' indicator shows for 1.4 s then reverts.
html: {{content}}
aria: The copy button must carry aria-label describing the action ('Copy to clipboard'). After a successful copy, update aria-label or use aria-live='polite' to announce 'Copied' to screen readers. The 1.4 s revert should reset both visual state and aria-label.
js_binding: data-ps-copy attribute; navigator.clipboard.writeText with textarea fallback for restricted contexts.
